headline: Crown Castle Names Kris Hinson as Chief Commercial Officer and Mark Lennon as Chief Information Officer
summary: HOUSTON, May 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) ("Crown Castle") announced today that Kris Hinson has been named to the position of Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer (CCO), and Mark Lennon has been named to the position of Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. Mr. Hinson will manage customer commercial relationships and commercial strategy. Mr. Lennon will lead Crown Castle’s data, digital and information security strategies and teams. C

headline: Should Crown Castle’s Fiber Sale And Debt Paydown Strategy Require Action From CCI Investors?
summary: Crown Castle recently reported a recovery in net income for Q1 2026 and continued progress on selling its Fiber and Small Cell businesses, while its board approved another quarterly cash dividend and the CEO prepared to present the updated story at Nareit’s REITweek conference. At the same time, the company’s plan to use fiber-sale proceeds for roughly US$1.00 billion of share repurchases and about US$7.00 billion of debt repayment, alongside an analyst downgrade citing weaker long-term...
